title: Treasurer of committee to give bond
doc_html:
§1754.  Treasurer of committee to give bond

The treasurer of the parish school loan fund committee shall give an indemnity bond in such sum as may be determined by the committee, made in favor of the governor of the state, or his successor in office.  The committee shall pay the premium of this bond.
doc_text:
§1754.  Treasurer of committee to give bond
The treasurer of the parish school loan fund committee shall give an indemnity bond in such sum as may be determined by the committee, made in favor of the governor of the state, or his successor in office.  The committee shall pay the premium of this bond.
